zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip LeCaretter於1259年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，他的父親Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter37歲，母親Sibilla de Cantilupe38歲。他於1277年與Emma LeCharetter在英國貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1320年在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip LeCaretter于1259年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可时，他的父亲Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter37岁，母亲Sibilla de Cantilupe38岁。他于1277年与Emma LeCharetter在英国貝德福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1320年在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip LeCaretter was born in 1259, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter, was 37 and his mother, Sibilla de Cantilupe, was 38. He married Emma LeCharetter in 1277, in Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1320, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Bury St Edmunds Abbey, Suffolk, England: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip LeCaretter est né en 1259, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Sibilla de Cantilupe, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Emma LeCharetter en 1277, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1320, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Bury St Edmunds Abbey, Suffolk, England: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Philip LeCaretter 1259 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter 37 und seine Mutter Sibilla de Cantilupe 38. Er hat 1277 in Bedfordshire, England Emma LeCharetter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1320 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England und wurde in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Emma LeCharetter nel 1277, nel Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1320, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip LeCaretterが1259年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetterは37歳，母Sibilla de Cantilupeは38歳であった。1277年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでEmma LeCharetterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1320年にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズにて埋葬された。

ko.Bury St Edmunds Abbey, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Philip LeCaretter(이)가 1259년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibilla de Cantilupe(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1277년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 Emma LeCharetter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1320년 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Emma LeCharetter em 1277, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.Bury St Edmunds Abbey, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip LeCaretter родился в 1259 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibilla de Cantilupe, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma LeCharetter в 1277 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1320 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
